candidate_summary: Reframe attention's softmax over high-norm tokens as Mercator-style area inflation, then apply a learned cos(angular-latitude) logit reweighting plus null-space projection at inference to suppress 'polar' token contributions.
hit_rule: hit = kw>=2 OR cos>=0.7 OR judge>=0.7

results.title: Positional Encoding in Transformer-Based Time Series Models: A Survey
results.judge_reason: Survey of positional encoding strategies for time-series; no mention of Mercator inflation, cosine reweighting at high-norm tokens, or null-space ablation.

results.title: On the Geometry of Positional Encodings in Transformers
results.judge_reason: Identifies that positional-encoding geometry yields a spherical manifold and spherical transformers outperform planar ones, but does not formulate Mercator-style inflation correction nor null-space ablation of high-norm tokens.

results.title: SphereUFormer: U-Shaped Transformer for Spherical 360 Perception (CVPR 2025)
results.judge_reason: Adds vertical-angle positional encoding for 360 imagery using sinusoidal phi encoding; data-domain spherical, not a cartographic correction of softmax attention over high-norm tokens.

results.title: Attention on the Sphere (NVIDIA, 2025-11)
results.judge_reason: Integrates quadrature weights into attention for spherical data domains; conceptually related but does not target high-norm token inflation, Mercator correction at inference, or null-space projection in standard text transformers.

results.title: Unpacking Positional Encoding in Transformers: A Spectral Analysis of Content-Position Coupling
results.judge_reason: Spectral analysis of how positional info couples into attention logits; does not propose cosine-of-latitude logit reweighting nor null-space ablation of polar tokens.

results.title: Bayesian Geometry of Transformer Attention
results.judge_reason: Bayesian geometric prior on attention referencing embedding-manifold curvature; lacks Mercator framing, high-norm reweighting, and null-space projection mechanism.

results.title: Mercator projection (Wikipedia)
results.judge_reason: Encyclopedia entry on the cartographic projection itself; contains no LLM application, attention mechanism, or null-space technique.

results.title: Positional Embeddings in Transformer Models: Evolution from Text to Vision (ICLR 2025 blog)
results.judge_reason: Overview of positional embedding schemes (RoPE, ALiBi, etc.) without any cartographic-correction or null-space-projection framing.

verdict: Independently judged NOVEL: no result combines Mercator-style cosine-of-latitude logit reweighting with null-space ablation of high-norm 'polar' tokens at inference on a standard text transformer. The closest neighbors (Attention on the Sphere, SphereUFormer, geometry-of-PE work) apply spherical machinery to spherical input domains or describe manifold structure, not a cartographic-distortion correction on softmax logits. Expected disagreement_count vs primary likely 0; my numbers calibrate similarly but are not byte-identical.
